products.title: Al Ain Water Bambini, 1.5L Water, Pack of 6, Food Preparation Bottled Water, Ready to Use, Formulated Especially for Babies
products.body_html:
SUITABLE FOR MAKING BABY FOOD: Al Ain Bambini water is perfect for preparing baby milk, transitional milk, soluble baby foods, and mixing with juices. Safe and convenient, it’s the ideal water choice for your baby.

CONVENIENT HYDRATION: Take Al Ain Bambini baby water on the go with its portable bottle and resealable cap. The durable design of this bottled water ensures practicality, making it a convenient choice for busy parents and active babies.

THE PUREST FORM OF WATER: Free from sodium, bromate, fluoride, and nitrates, Al Ain Bambini protects your baby’s kidneys, teeth, and brain, delivering the purest and safest water for your little one’s health and development.

BABIES DESERVE THE BEST: Al Ain Bambini Water contributes to your baby's overall well-being. Babies deserve the best, so by ditching sugary drinks and opting for Al Ain Water, it will help their digestion and growth and enhance their mental clarity.

PRODUCED UNDER STRINGENT QUALITY CONTROL: Al Ain Bambini is produced under stringent quality control, providing a balanced formula of essential minerals for babies. This baby water ensures quality and safety for your baby.

products.title: 24x500ml VOSS Natural Mineral Water RPET
products.body_html:
PREMIUM MINERAL WATER - Originating from a pristine aquifer deep beneath the earth of Norway, VOSS mineral water is naturally filtered through layers of rock and sand to provide a pure, crisp taste.

PURE WATER - With a low mineral count, VOSS water is one of the purest bottles of water available with minimal Total Dissolved Solids (TDS). Enjoyed by households, hotels, and restaurants alike, VOSS is the perfect bottled water companion.

ICONIC VOSS BOTTLE - The VOSS 100% PET drinking water bottle, designed by fashion designer Neil Kraft, has the signature charisma, elegance, and purity of the VOSS aesthetic. Made from the highest standard and unwavering like our commitment to sustainability.

NATURAL REFRESHMENT - Our water has a balanced pH and mineral composition that give it a distinctive taste. It does not contain allergens or sensitivities and is the ideal rehydrating beverage, deliciously served cold.

24 PACK - Indulge in the convenience of this pack, offering 24 x 500 ml VOSS water bottles. With a wider mouth design, personalize your hydration experience by infusing fresh fruit pieces for a burst of flavor and refreshment.

products.title: 24x375ml VOSS Sparkling Nat Min Wtr GB
products.body_html:
PURE REFRESHMENT - Originating from a pristine aquifer deep beneath the earth of Norway with added ultra-fine bubbles to offer an enhanced and refreshing drinking water experience. Ideal for pairing with seafood, fruit, and chocolate dishes.

LOW MINERAL CONTENT- Carefully sourced for purity, VOSS sparkling water has a low mineral content, with minimal Total Dissolved Solids (TDS), that allows its clean, fresh taste to shine through in every sip. VOSS is the perfect bottled water companion.

ICONIC VOSS BOTTLE - The Voss glass bottle, designed by fashion designer Neil Kraft, has the signature charisma, elegance, and purity of the Voss aesthetic. Made from the highest standard and unwavering like our commitment to sustainability.

VERSATILE MIXER - Fresh and effervescent, this sparkling water makes an excellent mixer for cocktails and mocktails. Elevate your drink creations with its delicate bubbles.

24 PACK - Indulge in the convenience of this pack, offering 24 x 375 ml VOSS Sparkling water bottles. With a wider mouth design, personalize your hydration experience by infusing fresh fruit pieces for a burst of flavor and refreshment.

products.title: Al Ain Plant Based Bottled Drinking Water 480ml Pack of 12
products.body_html:
MAKE A SUSTAINABLE CHOICE: Enjoy pure, refreshing water while making an eco-friendly decision—Al Ain’s 100% plant-based bottle is better for you and the planet.

FEEL GOOD ABOUT YOUR IMPACT: Our biodegradable and fully recyclable bottles reduce waste, returning to nature in less than three months under composting conditions.

PURE WATER, CLEAN CONSCIENCE: Free from petroleum and its by-products, Al Ain’s plant-based bottle helps you stay hydrated without harming the environment.

SUPPORT A GREENER FUTURE: With 60% lower CO2 emissions and over 50% energy savings in production, every bottle you choose contributes to a healthier planet.

A SMART CHOICE FOR EVERYDAY LIFE: Whether at home, work, or on the go, Al Ain’s plant-based bottle lets you enjoy premium hydration while staying committed to sustainability.
